bme_free_mem_info Struct Reference
[Bare Metal Environment APIs]

Information for the free memory in the system. More...


Data Fields

PA base_pa
 Base physical address of the free memory space.
uint64_t len
 Length of the free memory, in bytes.

Detailed Description

Information for the free memory in the system.

Field Documentation

PA bme_free_mem_info::base_pa

Base physical address of the free memory space.

uint64_t bme_free_mem_info::len

Length of the free memory, in bytes.
